title: epicranthes corneri
intro: Epicranthes corneri, also known as the 'Corner's Epicranthes', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid native to the Philippines, prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by making a decoction from its roots, which can be consumed as a tea, or used in herbal preparations for topical applications, such as poultices and compresses.
